message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Webブラウザ" as WebBrowser
participant "CCM GUI\n(Web)" as CCM_GUI_Web
participant "CCM GUI\n(WebSocket)" as CCM_GUI_WebSocket
participant "CCM SDK\n(IPC)" as CCM_SDK_IPC

activate CCM_SDK_IPC
self: ネットワーク情報変更通知 受信\n(RegistRecieveNetworkInfoHandler)
deactivate CCM_SDK_IPC

note right of CCM_GUI_Web
{
"command": "NetworkInfo",
"type": "notify",
"data": {
  "ID": "xxx",
  "CellularInfo": [{
    "SignalStrength": "...",
    "SignalStrengthUnit": "...",
    "Operator": "...",
    "PLMN": "...",
    "Band": "...",
    "CellID": "...",
    "AirInterface": "...",
    "Manufacture": "...",
    "ModelName": "...",
    "IMEI": "..."
  }],
  "QosInterfaceType": {
    "key1": "val1",
    ...
  }
}
}

activate CCM_GUI_WebSocket
CCM_SDK_IPC ..> CCM_GUI_WebSocket : ネットワーク情報変更通知 [notify]
deactivate CCM_GUI_WebSocket

activate CCM_GUI_Web
CCM_GUI_WebSocket ..> CCM_GUI_Web : 
deactivate CCM_GUI_Web

activate WebBrowser
CCM_GUI_Web ..> WebBrowser : 
deactivate WebBrowser

activate WebBrowser
self: 1秒間隔で保持データを画面に表示
deactivate WebBrowser

@enduml
```
